requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restrictions — No Horizontal RoHS Law in Laos
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——老挝无横向 RoHS 法律
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——寮國無橫向 RoHS 法律

summary.en: Laos does not have a horizontal RoHS law restricting hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment (EEE) equivalent to EU RoHS 2011/65/EU or China RoHS (GB/T 26572). As of the verified date, there is no Laos statute mandating concentration limits for lead (Pb), mercury (Hg), cadmium (Cd), hexavalent chromium (Cr(VI)), polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE), or phthalates in EEE homogeneous materials placed on the Laos market. DOSM conformity certification for regulated electrical goods covers electrical safety and EMC parameters, not chemical substance restriction. Exporters should confirm with DOSM and customs authorities whether any substance restriction declarations are required at the border.
summary.zh: 老挝没有针对电气电子设备（EEE）有害物质限制的横向 RoHS 法律，不同于欧盟 RoHS 2011/65/EU 或中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）。截至核实日期，老挝没有法规强制要求在老挝市场销售的 EEE 均质材料中铅（Pb）、汞（Hg）、镉（Cd）、六价铬（Cr(VI)）、多溴联苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）或邻苯二甲酸酯的浓度限值。DOSM 对受管制电气产品的符合性认证涵盖电气安全和 EMC 参数，不涵盖化学物质限制。出口商应向 DOSM 和海关当局确认是否需要在边境提供物质限制声明。
summary.zht: 寮國沒有針對電氣電子設備（EEE）有害物質限制的橫向 RoHS 法律，不同於歐盟 RoHS 2011/65/EU 或中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）。截至核實日期，寮國沒有法規強制要求在寮國市場銷售的 EEE 均質材料中鉛（Pb）、汞（Hg）、鎘（Cd）、六價鉻（Cr(VI)）、多溴聯苯（PBB）、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）或鄰苯二甲酸酯的濃度限值。DOSM 對受管制電氣產品的符合性認證涵蓋電氣安全和 EMC 參數，不涵蓋化學物質限制。出口商應向 DOSM 和海關當局確認是否需要在邊境提供物質限制聲明。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS law in force in Laos as of 2026-06-16
DOSM (Laos) conformity certification — does not include chemical substance restriction equivalent to RoHS

summary.en: China's hazardous substance restriction regime for EEE is governed by GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering 6 substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE). China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) mandates a hazardous substance disclosure label on EEE sold in China. These Chinese obligations do not extend to export products shipped to Laos, as Laos has no equivalent law. The 4 phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added in EU law are also absent from China's mandatory list and from Laos law.
summary.zh: 中国 EEE 有害物质限制制度由 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求）规定，涵盖 6 项物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE）。中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 产品上贴附有害物质披露标签。这些中国义务不延伸至出口至老挝的产品，因老挝无对应法律。欧盟法律新增的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）同样不在中国强制清单和老挝法律中。
summary.zht: 中國 EEE 有害物質限制制度由 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求）規定，涵蓋 6 項物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE）。中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 產品上貼附有害物質披露標籤。這些中國義務不延伸至出口至寮國的產品，因寮國無對應法律。歐盟法律新增的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）同樣不在中國強制清單和寮國法律中。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR, 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: No gap in the sense of an additional Laos obligation beyond Chinese requirements — Laos imposes no horizontal RoHS substance restriction on LED luminaires as of the verified date. Chinese manufacturers shipping products to Laos do not face phthalate testing, SVHC tracking, or RoHS DoC obligations arising from Laos law. However, commercial buyers (especially those reselling into EU or other RoHS markets) may contractually require RoHS test reports. Exporters should monitor for any future Laos EEE substance restriction regulation, as ASEAN member states are gradually aligning with international frameworks.
gap.zh: 在老挝义务超出中国要求方面不存在差距——截至核实日期，老挝对 LED 灯具不施加横向 RoHS 物质限制。向老挝发货的中国制造商不面临源自老挝法律的邻苯二甲酸酯检测、SVHC 追踪或 RoHS 符合性声明义务。然而，商业买方（尤其是转售至欧盟或其他 RoHS 市场的买方）可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 测试报告。出口商应关注老挝未来可能出台的 EEE 物质限制法规，因 ASEAN 成员国正逐步与国际框架接轨。
gap.zht: 在寮國義務超出中國要求方面不存在差距——截至核實日期，寮國對 LED 燈具不施加橫向 RoHS 物質限制。向寮國發貨的中國製造商不面臨源自寮國法律的鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測、SVHC 追蹤或 RoHS 符合性聲明義務。然而，商業買方（尤其是轉售至歐盟或其他 RoHS 市場的買方）可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 測試報告。出口商應關注寮國未來可能出台的 EEE 物質限制法規，因 ASEAN 成員國正逐步與國際框架接軌。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — no horizontal RoHS law in Laos as of 2026-06-16; no substance restriction obligations imposed by Laos law on LED luminaire imports
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous substance disclosure label required for EEE sold in China; GB/T 26572 covers 6 substances; 4 phthalates not in CN mandatory list

source.publisher: DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos has no horizontal RoHS law restricting hazardous substances in EEE as of the verified date. LED luminaire exporters from China to Laos face no Laos-law RoHS substance restriction obligations. Chinese RoHS disclosure obligations (China RoHS 2 label) apply to domestic CN market products only. Commercial buyers may contractually require RoHS test evidence. Monitor for future Laos regulatory developments in this area.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至核实日期，老挝没有限制 EEE 有害物质的横向 RoHS 法律。从中国向老挝出口 LED 灯具的出口商不面临老挝法律下的 RoHS 物质限制义务。中国 RoHS 披露义务（中国 RoHS 2 标签）仅适用于面向中国国内市场的产品。商业买方可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 测试证据。请关注该领域老挝监管动态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至核實日期，寮國沒有限制 EEE 有害物質的橫向 RoHS 法律。從中國向寮國出口 LED 燈具的出口商不面臨寮國法律下的 RoHS 物質限制義務。中國 RoHS 披露義務（中國 RoHS 2 標籤）僅適用於面向中國國內市場的產品。商業買方可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 測試證據。請關注該領域寮國監管動態。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical Substance Disclosure — Buyer and Supply Chain Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 化学物质披露——买方及供应链要求
requirement_topic.zht: 化學物質披露——買方及供應鏈要求

summary.en: Although Laos has no mandatory hazardous substance restriction law for EEE, commercial and institutional buyers in Laos (government tenders, NGO procurement, international hotel and building projects) may impose contractual requirements for substance declarations, Safety Data Sheets (SDS), or RoHS/REACH compliance evidence. MEM government procurement for energy-efficiency programmes may stipulate minimum documentation standards including substance declarations aligned with international norms. LNTA (Lao National Tourism Authority) or international hotel chain procurement may require RoHS-compliant documentation for LED luminaire supplies. These buyer-driven requirements are separate from any statutory obligation and must be confirmed contract by contract.
summary.zh: 尽管老挝没有针对 EEE 的强制有害物质限制法律，老挝的商业和机构买方（政府招标、非政府组织采购、国际酒店和建筑项目）可能提出合同性要求，包括物质声明、安全数据表（SDS）或 RoHS/REACH 合规证据。MEM 政府采购的节能项目可能规定最低文件标准，包括符合国际规范的物质声明。老挝国家旅游局（LNTA）或国际酒店集团采购可能要求 LED 灯具供应提供 RoHS 合规文件。这些买方驱动的要求独立于任何法定义务，须逐合同确认。
summary.zht: 儘管寮國沒有針對 EEE 的強制有害物質限制法律，寮國的商業和機構買方（政府招標、非政府組織採購、國際酒店和建築項目）可能提出合同性要求，包括物質聲明、安全數據表（SDS）或 RoHS/REACH 合規證據。MEM 政府採購的節能項目可能規定最低文件標準，包括符合國際規範的物質聲明。寮國國家旅遊局（LNTA）或國際酒店集團採購可能要求 LED 燈具供應提供 RoHS 合規文件。這些買方驅動的要求獨立於任何法定義務，須逐合同確認。

standards_or_laws: No statutory RoHS obligation in Laos — buyer-driven contractual requirements only
MEM (Laos) government procurement standards for energy-efficiency programmes
International buyer specifications referencing RoHS 2011/65/EU, REACH, or equivalent

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers with export experience typically maintain RoHS test reports (6-substance and 10-substance) and REACH SVHC declarations for EU and North American markets. These documents can be repurposed to satisfy buyer-driven substance declaration requirements in Laos without additional testing in most cases. China RoHS 2 domestic disclosure labelling (SJ/T 11364-2014) is not relevant to Laos export products and does not substitute for international buyer substance declarations.
summary.zh: 具备出口经验的中国制造商通常维护有 RoHS 测试报告（6 项和 10 项物质）及 REACH SVHC 声明，供欧盟和北美市场使用。在大多数情况下，这些文件可直接用于满足老挝买方驱动的物质声明要求，无需额外测试。中国 RoHS 2 国内披露标识（SJ/T 11364-2014）与老挝出口产品无关，不能替代国际买方的物质声明要求。
summary.zht: 具備出口經驗的中國製造商通常維護有 RoHS 測試報告（6 項和 10 項物質）及 REACH SVHC 聲明，供歐盟和北美市場使用。在大多數情況下，這些文件可直接用於滿足寮國買方驅動的物質聲明要求，無需額外測試。中國 RoHS 2 國內披露標識（SJ/T 11364-2014）與寮國出口產品無關，不能替代國際買方的物質聲明要求。

standards_or_laws: RoHS 10-substance test reports (IEC 62321 series) — available from export-oriented Chinese manufacturers
REACH SVHC declarations — available from export-oriented Chinese manufacturers for EU-market supply chains

gap.en: Gap is buyer-driven, not statutory. Chinese manufacturers supplying Laos government tenders, MEM-linked energy programmes, international hotel chains, or NGO procurement should prepare: (1) RoHS 10-substance test report (IEC 62321 series) even though not legally required in Laos; (2) REACH SVHC declaration if EU-aligned buyers are in the chain; (3) Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for components if required by buyer. Manufacturers already holding EU-market RoHS documentation can typically reuse it for Laos buyers without additional testing.
gap.zh: 差距源于买方，而非法规。向老挝政府招标、MEM 节能项目、国际酒店集团或非政府组织采购供货的中国制造商应准备：（1）RoHS 10 项物质测试报告（IEC 62321 系列），即使老挝法律不作要求；（2）若采购链中有欧盟对标买方，则须提供 REACH SVHC 声明；（3）若买方要求，则须提供组件安全数据表（SDS）。已持有欧盟市场 RoHS 文件的制造商通常无需额外测试即可复用于老挝买方。
gap.zht: 差距源於買方，而非法規。向寮國政府招標、MEM 節能項目、國際酒店集團或非政府組織採購供貨的中國製造商應準備：（1）RoHS 10 項物質測試報告（IEC 62321 系列），即使寮國法律不作要求；（2）若採購鏈中有歐盟對標買方，則須提供 REACH SVHC 聲明；（3）若買方要求，則須提供組件安全數據表（SDS）。已持有歐盟市場 RoHS 文件的製造商通常無需額外測試即可復用於寮國買方。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory under Laos law — buyer-driven contractual requirement; confirm documentation scope with each buyer or tender specification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory disclosure only (SJ/T 11364-2014 label for CN market); RoHS 10-substance and REACH SVHC documentation voluntary for CN market but commonly held for export

source.publisher: MEM — Ministry of Energy and Mines, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos imposes no statutory substance restriction on LED luminaire imports. However, MEM government procurement, international hotel projects, and NGO buyers may contractually require RoHS 10-substance test reports and REACH SVHC declarations. Chinese manufacturers holding EU-market substance documentation can generally reuse it for Laos buyers. Confirm exact documentation requirements in each tender or contract before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝对 LED 灯具进口不施加法定物质限制。但 MEM 政府采购、国际酒店项目及非政府组织买方可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 10 项物质测试报告及 REACH SVHC 声明。持有欧盟市场物质文件的中国制造商通常可将其复用于老挝买方。出货前确认每份招标或合同中的具体文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國對 LED 燈具進口不施加法定物質限制。但 MEM 政府採購、國際酒店項目及非政府組織買方可能在合同中要求提供 RoHS 10 項物質測試報告及 REACH SVHC 聲明。持有歐盟市場物質文件的中國製造商通常可將其復用於寮國買方。出貨前確認每份招標或合同中的具體文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Wireless Smart LED — MTPC Type Approval (Radio Spectrum / Laos PDR)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线智能 LED——MTPC 型号核准（无线电频谱 / 老挝人民民主共和国）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線智能 LED——MTPC 型號核准（無線電頻譜 / 寮國人民民主共和國）

summary.en: LED luminaires incorporating wireless radio interfaces (Wi-Fi 2.4/5 GHz, Bluetooth, Zigbee, Z-Wave, or similar) require radio type approval from MTPC (Ministry of Technology and Communications, Lao PDR) before they can be sold or operated in Laos. MTPC manages radio spectrum and issues type approvals for radio-transmitting devices. The type approval process requires technical specifications and test evidence; MTPC may accept test reports from CNAS-accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratories. Products lacking MTPC type approval may be detained at customs. Non-wireless LED luminaires are not subject to MTPC requirements.
summary.zh: 集成无线射频接口（Wi-Fi 2.4/5 GHz、蓝牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave 或类似）的 LED 灯具在老挝销售或使用前，须取得老挝信息技术与通信部（MTPC）的无线电型号核准。MTPC 管理无线电频谱并对无线电发射设备颁发型号核准。型号核准流程需要技术规格和测试证据；MTPC 可能接受 CNAS 认可或 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的测试报告。未取得 MTPC 型号核准的产品可能在海关被扣押。非无线 LED 灯具不受 MTPC 要求约束。
summary.zht: 集成無線射頻接口（Wi-Fi 2.4/5 GHz、藍牙、Zigbee、Z-Wave 或類似）的 LED 燈具在寮國銷售或使用前，須取得寮國信息技術與通信部（MTPC）的無線電型號核准。MTPC 管理無線電頻譜並對無線電發射設備頒發型號核准。型號核准流程需要技術規格和測試證據；MTPC 可能接受 CNAS 認可或 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的測試報告。未取得 MTPC 型號核准的產品可能在海關被扣押。非無線 LED 燈具不受 MTPC 要求約束。

standards_or_laws: MTPC (Ministry of Technology and Communications, Lao PDR) — radio type approval for wireless devices
Laos Telecommunications Law and radio spectrum regulations (MTPC)

summary.en: China's equivalent for wireless-enabled luminaires is SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval, required for any product incorporating a radio transmitter sold in China. SRRC type approval covers frequency, power, and spurious emission compliance. Chinese SRRC type approval does not satisfy Laos MTPC requirements; a separate MTPC application is required for the Laos market. Non-wireless LED luminaires are not subject to SRRC in China.
summary.zh: 中国对无线灯具的对应要求为国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准，适用于在中国销售的所有含无线电发射器的产品。SRRC 型号核准涵盖频率、功率和杂散发射合规。中国 SRRC 型号核准不满足老挝 MTPC 要求；老挝市场须单独申请 MTPC 核准。非无线 LED 灯具在中国不受 SRRC 约束。
summary.zht: 中國對無線燈具的對應要求為國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准，適用於在中國銷售的所有含無線電發射器的產品。SRRC 型號核准涵蓋頻率、功率和雜散發射合規。中國 SRRC 型號核准不滿足寮國 MTPC 要求；寮國市場須單獨申請 MTPC 核准。非無線 LED 燈具在中國不受 SRRC 約束。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-transmitting devices sold in China (SRRC / MIIT)
GB/T 22450.1 — Radio frequency characteristics and tests for wireless LAN equipment (China)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval does not transfer to Laos — a separate MTPC application is required for wireless-enabled LED luminaires. Key gaps: (1) MTPC type approval process timeline and fees should be confirmed early; (2) test reports from CNAS or ILAC MRA labs may be accepted by MTPC — confirm accepted accreditation bodies; (3) frequency band allocations (2.4 GHz, 5 GHz, Bluetooth/Zigbee sub-GHz) should be verified against Laos ITU-aligned spectrum plan; (4) non-wireless LED luminaires are not subject to MTPC and face no radio compliance gap. Transit via Thailand may trigger additional radio type approval requirements for Thailand; verify if transit customs inspection applies.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 型号核准不能转移至老挝——无线 LED 灯具须单独申请 MTPC 核准。主要差距：（1）MTPC 型号核准流程时间和费用应提前确认；（2）CNAS 或 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的测试报告可能被 MTPC 接受——确认被接受的认可机构；（3）频段分配（2.4 GHz、5 GHz、蓝牙/Zigbee 亚 GHz 频段）应根据老挝 ITU 对齐的频谱规划核实；（4）非无线 LED 灯具不受 MTPC 约束，不存在无线电合规差距。经泰国中转可能触发泰国额外的无线电型号核准要求；核实过境海关检验是否适用。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 型號核准不能轉移至寮國——無線 LED 燈具須單獨申請 MTPC 核准。主要差距：（1）MTPC 型號核准流程時間和費用應提前確認；（2）CNAS 或 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的測試報告可能被 MTPC 接受——確認被接受的認可機構；（3）頻段分配（2.4 GHz、5 GHz、藍牙/Zigbee 亞 GHz 頻段）應根據寮國 ITU 對齊的頻譜規劃核實；（4）非無線 LED 燈具不受 MTPC 約束，不存在無線電合規差距。經泰國中轉可能觸發泰國額外的無線電型號核准要求；核實過境海關檢驗是否適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled LED luminaires — MTPC type approval required before sale or operation in Laos; non-wireless luminaires not subject to MTPC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires — SRRC type approval required before sale in China; non-wireless luminaires not subject to SRRC

source.publisher: MTPC — Ministry of Technology and Communications, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless-enabled LED luminaires (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee) require MTPC type approval before sale or use in Laos. Chinese SRRC type approval does not satisfy MTPC requirements. Confirm accepted laboratory accreditation, frequency band allocations, and MTPC application timeline before product launch. Non-wireless LED luminaires are not subject to MTPC radio requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备无线功能的 LED 灯具（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee）在老挝销售或使用前须取得 MTPC 型号核准。中国 SRRC 型号核准不满足 MTPC 要求。产品上市前确认被接受的实验室认可资质、频段分配及 MTPC 申请时间表。非无线 LED 灯具不受 MTPC 无线电要求约束。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備無線功能的 LED 燈具（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee）在寮國銷售或使用前須取得 MTPC 型號核准。中國 SRRC 型號核准不滿足 MTPC 要求。產品上市前確認被接受的實驗室認可資質、頻段分配及 MTPC 申請時間表。非無線 LED 燈具不受 MTPC 無線電要求約束。
